all.en: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
all.zh: 即時發布

all.en: Vertex Solutions Announces Launch of LedgerPro 5.0
all.zh: Vertex Solutions 宣布推出 LedgerPro 5.0

all.en: BOSTON, March 12 — Vertex Solutions, a leading provider of financial management software, today unveiled LedgerPro 5.0, the latest version of its award-winning accounting platform.
all.zh: 波士頓，3 月 12 日 — 領先的財務管理軟體供應商 Vertex Solutions 今日發表其屢獲殊榮的會計平台最新版本 LedgerPro 5.0。

all.en: Designed specifically for small and mid-sized enterprises, LedgerPro 5.0 introduces a redesigned user interface and powerful new automation tools.
all.zh: LedgerPro 5.0 專為中小型企業設計，推出了重新設計的使用者介面及強大的新自動化工具。

all.en: Key features include real-time expense tracking, automated invoice generation, and seamless integration with over 200 banking institutions.
all.zh: 主要功能包括即時費用追蹤、自動發票產生，以及與 200 多家銀行機構的無縫整合。

all.en: The platform also offers an enhanced reporting module that allows users to generate customized financial statements in seconds.
all.zh: 該平台還提供增強的報表模組，讓使用者能在數秒內產生自訂財務報表。

all.en: 「Our customers told us they wanted simpler workflows and smarter analytics,」 said CEO Daniel Park.
all.zh: 「我們的客戶告訴我們他們想要更簡單的工作流程及更智慧的分析，」執行長 Daniel Park 表示。

all.en: 「LedgerPro 5.0 delivers exactly that, while reducing the time spent on routine bookkeeping by up to 60 percent.」
all.zh: 「LedgerPro 5.0 正是提供這一切，同時將例行記帳所花費的時間減少高達 60%。」

all.en: The software is available in three subscription tiers starting at 29 dollars per user per month.
all.zh: 該軟體提供三種訂閱方案，起價為每位使用者每月 29 美元。

all.en: The Professional tier, priced at 59 dollars monthly, includes multi-currency support and advanced tax compliance features.
all.zh: 專業版每月 59 美元，包含多幣別支援及進階稅務合規功能。

all.en: Enterprise customers can request custom pricing for organizations with more than 100 users.
all.zh: 企業客戶若組織擁有超過 100 位使用者，可洽詢客製化定價。

all.en: All plans include 24-hour technical support and a 30-day money-back guarantee.
all.zh: 所有方案均包含 24 小時技術支援及 30 天退款保證。

all.en: Existing LedgerPro customers will receive a free upgrade beginning April 1.
all.zh: 現有 LedgerPro 客戶將自 4 月 1 日起獲得免費升級。

all.en: New users can sign up for a complimentary 14-day trial at www.vertexsolutions.com/trial.
all.zh: 新使用者可於 www.vertexsolutions.com/trial 註冊免費 14 天試用。

all.en: Vertex Solutions will host a series of free online demonstrations throughout March and April.
all.zh: Vertex Solutions 將於 3 月及 4 月期間舉辦一系列免費線上展示。

all.en: Founded in 2008, Vertex Solutions serves more than 75,000 businesses across North America and Europe.
all.zh: Vertex Solutions 成立於 2008 年，服務北美及歐洲超過 75,000 家企業。

all.en: For media inquiries, please contact Sarah Liu at press@vertexsolutions.com or 617-555-0143.
all.zh: 媒體查詢請聯絡 Sarah Liu，電子郵件 press@vertexsolutions.com 或致電 617-555-0143。

all.en: Industry analysts have already praised the redesigned dashboard for its clarity and ease of navigation.
all.zh: 業界分析師已盛讚重新設計的儀表板，因其清晰易用且操作直覺。

all.en: A mobile companion app for iOS and Android will be released by the end of the second quarter.
all.zh: 適用於 iOS 與 Android 的行動配套應用程式將於第二季底前推出。

all.en: Beta testers reported that month-end closing tasks were completed nearly twice as fast as before.
all.zh: Beta 測試者回報，月底結帳作業完成速度幾乎比以往快了一倍。

all.en: Security has been strengthened with two-factor authentication and end-to-end encryption for all client data.
all.zh: 安全性透過雙因素驗證及所有客戶資料的端對端加密獲得強化。

all.en: Vertex Solutions has also partnered with three major payroll providers to streamline cross-platform reconciliation.
all.zh: Vertex Solutions 還與三家大型薪資服務商合作，以簡化跨平台對帳作業。

all.en: Certified accountants can now apply for the LedgerPro Partner Program to access exclusive training resources.
all.zh: 持證會計師現可申請加入 LedgerPro 合作夥伴計畫，以取得專屬訓練資源。

all.en: The company plans to expand its operations into the Asia-Pacific region during the fourth quarter.
all.zh: 該公司計劃於第四季將業務拓展至亞太地區。

all.en: A dedicated customer success team will guide enterprise clients through onboarding and data migration.
all.zh: 專屬的客戶成功團隊將協助企業客戶完成導入及資料移轉作業。

all.en: Vertex Solutions reports that its annual revenue has grown by 35 percent over the previous fiscal year.
all.zh: Vertex Solutions 公布其年營收較前一會計年度成長 35%。

all.en: More information about LedgerPro 5.0 is available on the company website and at upcoming industry conferences.
all.zh: 關於 LedgerPro 5.0 的更多資訊請見公司網站，並可於即將舉行的產業大會上獲得詳情。

all.en: Early adopters who upgrade before May 15 will receive three months of premium analytics services at no charge.
all.zh: 於 5 月 15 日前升級的早期採用者將獲得三個月免費的進階分析服務。

all.en: The launch event will be live-streamed from the company headquarters and is open to registered participants worldwide.
all.zh: 發表會將自公司總部現場直播，並開放全球已註冊的參與者觀看。

all.en: Independent reviewers from leading technology publications have rated the platform a perfect score for usability.
all.zh: 領先科技出版品的獨立評論人在易用性方面給予該平台滿分評價。

all.en: Vertex Solutions is committed to releasing quarterly feature updates based on direct feedback from its user community.
all.zh: Vertex Solutions 致力於根據其使用者社群的直接回饋每季發布功能更新。

all.en: Training webinars in five languages will help international customers transition smoothly to the new platform.
all.zh: 提供五種語言的訓練網路研討會，將協助國際客戶順利轉移至新平台。

all.en: Customers may also visit any of the company regional offices for in-person consultations starting this June.
all.zh: 客戶亦可自今年 6 月起前往公司各區域辦事處進行面對面諮詢。

all.en: The product roadmap for the next eighteen months includes artificial intelligence features for predictive forecasting.
all.zh: 未來十八個月的產品藍圖包含用於預測性預估的人工智慧功能。

all.en: A new developer marketplace will allow third-party engineers to publish custom plug-ins and integrations.
all.zh: 新的開發者市集將讓第三方工程師能發布客製化外掛及整合功能。

all.en: Charitable organizations and educational institutions remain eligible for substantial nonprofit discounts on all subscription levels.
all.zh: 慈善組織及教育機構仍可享有所有訂閱等級的大幅非營利優惠。

all.en: Vertex Solutions encourages all stakeholders to follow its official channels for ongoing announcements and product updates.
all.zh: Vertex Solutions 鼓勵所有利害關係人關注其官方管道以獲得持續的公告及產品更新。

all.en: I tried the beta version on my own freelance bookkeeping last weekend, and honestly the auto-categorization saved me hours.
all.zh: 我上週末用 Beta 版處理自己的自由接案記帳，老實說自動分類功能幫我省下好幾個小時。

all.en: A friend of mine who runs a small bakery said she finally stopped dreading her quarterly tax filings after switching over.
all.zh: 我有個開麵包店的朋友說，換到這個系統後她終於不再害怕每季的報稅工作。

all.en: The company is offering a referral bonus where existing users get a free month for every friend who signs up.
all.zh: 公司推出推薦獎勵方案，現有用戶每推薦一位朋友註冊即可獲得一個月免費使用。

all.en: If you are tired of juggling three different spreadsheets for one client, this is probably worth a fourteen-day look.
all.zh: 如果您厭倦了為一個客戶同時處理三份不同的試算表，這個工具大概值得花十四天試試看。

all.en: I joined one of the free webinars last Tuesday evening and even managed to ask a question during the live Q and A.
all.zh: 我上週二晚上參加了其中一場免費網路研討會，甚至還在現場問答時間提了問題。

all.en: Some of my accountant friends are skeptical about AI features, but most admitted the data import wizard is genuinely useful.
all.zh: 我有些會計師朋友對 AI 功能抱持懷疑，但多數都承認資料匯入精靈確實好用。

all.en: Customer support actually picked up within two minutes when I called, which is rare for any software company these days.
all.zh: 我打給客服時兩分鐘內就有人接聽，這年頭任何軟體公司都很少見。

all.en: The mobile app lets you snap a photo of a paper receipt and it appears in your expense log almost instantly.
all.zh: 手機 App 讓您拍下紙本收據照片後幾乎立刻就會出現在費用紀錄中。

all.en: My boss asked me to compare three platforms last month, and LedgerPro came out clearly ahead on price and learning curve.
all.zh: 上個月老闆叫我比較三個平台，LedgerPro 在價格和學習門檻上明顯勝出。

all.en: Honestly, if you only need basic bookkeeping for a side hustle, the starter tier already covers more than you would expect.
all.zh: 老實說，如果您只是為了副業做基本記帳，入門方案能涵蓋的功能已經超出您的預期。
